objective: Stabilize Sector East and prevent hostile escalation near Grid 447.

events.summary: SIGINT intercept from eastern corridor: encrypted burst transmission consistent with hostile command-and-control activity. Confidence moderate. Source: comms_intercept.

threat.label: Hostile armored column
threat.summary: Drone recon confirms 3x armored vehicles moving south toward Grid 447. Speed indicates arrival within 45 minutes. Formation suggests offensive intent.

events.summary: Bravo-2 reports medical supplies exhausted after treating two casualties from IED strike on patrol route. Requesting medevac support.
Ground sensor network confirms hostile column has halted at Grid 445. Vehicles stationary for 12 minutes. Possible staging for coordinated assault or waiting for reinforcement.

threat.label: Possible hostile observation post
threat.summary: Infrared signature detected on ridgeline overlooking Sector East. Could be hostile forward observer. Single source, low confidence.

events.summary: CAS engagement by Viper-11 confirmed. Hostile column dispersed. Two vehicles disabled, one retreating north. BDA assessment pending. Sector East corridor pressure reduced.
